description_long: This object is a rectangular box with a mint green exterior, featuring a large, vibrant photograph of a cluster of colorful daisy-like flowers on its main face. The flowers in the image display a mix of pink, yellow, and magenta petals with yellow centers, densely packed together to create a lush, lively bouquet. The box also includes a smaller inset image of the same flowers and bold black text reading 'FLOWER 11' along with smaller descriptive text about fragrance. The sides of the box repeat the main floral image and text, but with a more vertical, narrow presentation. The surface appears smooth and matte, with crisp edges and a uniform color outside the printed areas. The object is likely made of cardboard or paperboard, typical for packaging, and is lightweight and portable. There are no visible openings, handles, or interactive features beyond the printed graphics.
description: A mint green rectangular box featuring vivid photographs of pink, yellow, and magenta daisy-like flowers, with bold text and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows the largest floral image, bold 'FLOWER 11' text, and a smaller inset photo, all on a mint green background.
description_view_1: This side view displays a narrower version of the floral image and text, with less visible detail compared to the front.
description_view_2: The opposite face mirrors the front, again showing the large floral image, text, and inset photo on a mint green surface.
description_view_3: This side view is similar to view 1, with a vertical floral image and text, but from the opposite side of the box.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals in the floral image are arranged radially around a central disc, with each flower displaying a symmetrical, daisy-like whorl. The petals overlap slightly at their bases, forming a dense, circular pattern typical of Asteraceae.
